title: LGBT NATIONAL YOUTH TALKLINE - 211info
text: LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER LGBT NATIONAL YOUTH TALKLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides telephone, online private one-to-one chat, and email peer support for LGBT teens and young adults to talk about coming-out issues, relationship concerns, parent issues, school problems, HIV/AIDS anxiety, safer-sex information, etc. 2261 Market Street #296 San Francisco, CA 94114 Eligibility: Ages 13-25 who identify as gay, lesbian, bisexual, and transgender Hours: Monday-Friday 11am-8pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (800) 246-7743 800-246 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (415) 355-0003 Administration Hotline (800) 246-7743 800-246-PRIDE Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, chat, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: LGBTQ2+ Helplines * LGBTQ2+ Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LGBT NATIONAL HOTLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LGBT NATIONAL SENIOR HOTLINE MUTUAL SUPPORT - LGBT NATIONAL COMING OUT SUPPORT HOTLINE MUTUAL SUPPORT - MODERATED YOUTH CHAT ROOMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER
